blurb: Law-firm AI/regulatory practice. Launch coverage uses first-party European AI Continent Action Plan analysis.

publications.title: The European Commission publishes its AI Continent Action Plan
publications.summary: A&O Shearman analyses the European Commission’s AI Continent Action Plan, including the AI Office service desk and policy measures intended to support AI development and compliance.
